details.productUrlName: Sword of Forge and Frontier Oil Slick Raised Foil

customAttributes.description:
Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has protection from red and from green.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play those cards this turn. You may play an additional land this turn.
Equip 2
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 3/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
